calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Apr-28-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: J. D. Trow for Gil Guzman.

The Court stated that it was having difficulty because there already is a death certificate, that the Party wanted to amend the death certificate and that Health and Safety Code section 103225 provides that there is a different method for amending the death certificate. Ms. Trow stated that Mr. Guzman attempted to have the death certificate amended through Sacramento but that it was rejected. The Court also expressed concern with the marriage certificate stating that it was not a license and that the marriage certificate itself was insufficient evidence. The Court denied the petition without prejudice.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
